summary: Completed end-to-end testing for PMAISM landing page. All 7 backend pytest tests passed (metrics, leads CRUD, validation). All frontend flows verified via Playwright: hero headline, no pricing visible, dialog open from hero/nav, lead submit success, demo/apply toggle, nav smooth scroll, success stories carousel, FAQ accordion, WhatsApp FAB.

minor.issue: Returns 200 OK on create; FastAPI convention prefers 201 Created for resource creation

logger is referenced inside create_lead (line 96) before being defined at module bottom (line 141). Works only because module finishes loading before requests hit, but is a code smell - move logger setup above the routes

issues: WhatsApp FAB uses placeholder wa.me/10000000000 (per spec: placeholder), make sure to replace with real number before launch

action_items: (Optional) Move `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` above the route definitions in server.py for cleaner code
Replace placeholder WhatsApp number (wa.me/10000000000) and BRAND placeholders before going live
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is used in create_lead before its declaration (line 96 vs 141); ordering relies on Python's deferred name resolution and is a maintainability risk
server.py: POST /api/leads returns 200 instead of conventional 201
No rate limiting / captcha on the public POST /api/leads endpoint — easy spam vector for a public landing form
Frontend LeadDialog.jsx hardcodes empty default state but does not reset `done` on dialog reopen until after a 2.2s timeout — acceptable but could race if user reopens quickly
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test leads (TEST_Demo_User demo, TEST_Apply_User apply, TEST_FE_User demo) in MongoDB via the public POST /api/leads endpoint. All prefixed with TEST_ for easy identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers /api/metrics + /api/leads (POST demo, POST apply, invalid email 422, invalid lead_type 422, GET list, GET filter). Frontend uses data-testids: hero-cta-demo, nav-cta-demo, lead-dialog, lead-name, lead-email, lead-phone, lead-submit, lead-toggle-demo, lead-toggle-apply, lead-experience, lead-time, nav-link-<id>, story-card, story-next, story-prev, faq-item-<n>, whatsapp-fab. Public URL via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Lead submit success state shows 'Seat Reserved' for demo and 'Application Received' for apply.
